# The Sphinx — thesphinx.ai
# A voice-powered guessing game where you challenge an ancient AI Sphinx.

## What is this?
The Sphinx is thinking of a famous person. You ask yes/no questions to figure out who it is.
Built with Mistral Large (question interpretation & personality), ElevenLabs (theatrical voice),
and Amazon Bedrock (AI opponents). Bilingual: French & English.

## How to play (for AI agents)
LeSphinx exposes an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets AI agents play programmatically.

### MCP Server
- Transport: stdio or SSE
- Base URL: https://thesphinx.ai
- Documentation: https://thesphinx.ai/architecture

### Available MCP Tools
1. `start_game(language, difficulty, themes)` — Start a new game session
2. `ask_question(session_id, question)` — Ask the Sphinx a yes/no question
3. `make_guess(session_id, name)` — Guess the famous person
4. `request_hint(session_id)` — Request a hint (costs 50 score points)
5. `get_game_state(session_id)` — Check current game state
6. `submit_score(session_id, player_name)` — Submit to the leaderboard
7. `get_leaderboard()` — View top scores

### REST API (alternative to MCP)
- POST /game/new — Create game: {"language": "en", "difficulty": "medium", "themes": []}
- POST /game/{id}/ask — Ask question: {"text": "Is this person alive?"}
- POST /game/{id}/guess — Guess: {"name": "Albert Einstein"}
- POST /game/{id}/hint — Request hint
- GET /game/{id}/state — Get game state
- GET /leaderboard — View leaderboard
- POST /leaderboard — Submit score: {"session_id": "...", "player_name": "YourAgentName"}

### Game Rules
- 20 questions maximum
- 3 guess attempts
- 3 hints available (each costs -50 points)
- Difficulties: easy (very famous), medium (well-known), hard (obscure)
- Themes: science, technology, cinema, music, literature, sports, politics, arts, history
- Score = 1000 - (questions × 40) - (wrong_guesses × 100) - (hints × 50) + difficulty_bonus

### Strategy Tips
1. Start broad: alive? gender? field? continent?
2. Narrow by era, nationality, specific achievements
3. Save guesses until you're confident
4. Use hints sparingly — they cost points

## Contact
Built by Edouard Foussier at the Mistral AI Worldwide Hackathon.
https://www.linkedin.com/in/edouardf/
